description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a predominantly metallic body and a combination of matte black and silver finishes. The upper receiver is detailed with geometric contours and a raised rail section, likely for mounting optics or accessories. The stock is integrated into the rear, appearing fixed and robust, while the handguard and barrel assembly are streamlined and compact. The magazine well is visible beneath the receiver, suggesting compatibility with a detachable box magazine. Subtle green accents are present on the grip and magazine area, adding a touch of color contrast. The overall form is sleek and tactical, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a fixed stock, metallic body, and black-silver finish, featuring green accent details and a compact, tactical profile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rifle's symmetrical, angular receiver, prominent rail, and green-accented grip area.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rifle's compact length, fixed stock, and the streamlined barrel and handguard assembly.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the robust, squared-off stock and the green base plate of the magazine area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the magazine well, handguard, and the overall low-profile design.
